productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Aess Polo Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Blue polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, chest placket, contrast panelling on the collar and shoulder, embroidered brand name and adidas patented 3-Stripes appliquéd on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash or use fabric softener Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo If you love to stay dry, fresh and comfortable, there's no better way than with this polo T-shirt from adidas. Engineered to wick away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable, this tee fits neatly along the contours of your body, providing you with a snug fit. Wear it to the gym or the Sports club, or simply pair it with jeans and casual footwear. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
